sentences.arabic: أَعْلَنَتِ الْحُكُومَةُ عَنْ إِجَازَةٍ رَسْمِيَّةٍ بِمُنَاسَبَةِ الْعِيدِ الْوَطَنِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Vlada je proglasila službeni odmor povodom nacionalnog praznika.
sentences.translationEn: The government declared an official holiday on the occasion of the national day.
